3128440.name: Moments
3128440.description:
You’ve discovered an ancient celestial game called Moments. In this enchanting puzzle adventure, you must knock the moon out of the sky, bounce it along the clouds, and guide it into a mysterious black hole.

Armed with your wits and a few celestial tools, you set out to master the art of moon-guiding. Can you strategically place objects to direct the falling moon to its goal? It won’t be easy. The sky is filled with challenges, and only the most dedicated players will succeed. But with a little ingenuity, you might just become the master of Moments!

Features

  • Guide the moon through intricate puzzles by placing objects in its path.
  • Test your skills with progressively difficult levels.
  • Relaxing Soundtrack.
